entry.title: Re: Enhanced Custom Code Analysis in SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA Upgrades
entry.content:
Hi, is there available a ATC for upgrade form version 1610?

Thanks

entry.title: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
My report is grouped by status and sorted by the status column. Through the UI the grouping functionality accepts only one column as the criteria. How can I filter based on a combination of criteria?

Records to display in the first section (active or under renewal) if: Status is Active or (status is Renewal AND the expiration date is more recent than the last 12 months).

Records to display in the second section (Expired) if: Status is Expired or (status is Renewal AND the expiration date is older than 12 months ago from today).

entry.title: Re: Batch specific UOM master data
entry.content: Simply go in CL02, GO to Characteritics screen , go to extreme right and activate Proportion/Product Unit Relevant tick .

entry.title: Re: Cyrstal Reports Unable to open report in CR Enterprise
entry.content:
Hi Bill,

That's not possible unless the RPT file is either corrupted on the BOE server or you do not have writes to edit the report. As noted in the error message check with the BOE admin to verify you do have rights to edit it.

To clarify, you can open reports using CR Designer except if it's been saved as a CR for Ent. Report. Once saved as a CR for Ent it can then only be edited in CRfEnt.

CR for Ent. is ending life in a few years so I suggest not using that version any longer.

Search the home page for more info.

This link has it:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports/faq

Don

entry.title: Re: Service Layer - Filtrar IncomingPayments por factura
entry.content:
POST https://yourserver:50000/b1s/v1/QueryService_PostQuery
{
    "QueryOption": "$expand=IncomingPayments($select=DocEntry, DocNum),IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices($select=DocEntry,DocNum)&$filter=IncomingPayments/DocEntry eq IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices/DocNum and IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices/DocEntry eq 2472",
    "QueryPath": "$crossjoin(IncomingPayments,IncomingPayments/PaymentInvoices)"
}

entry.title: Re: Does crystal report 30 day trial doesn't provide 'Rep...
entry.content:
You can get CR for VS (.NET) from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

And CR for Eclipse (Java) here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088796.html

entry.title: Re: Debug Java Code in Agentry Cloud Edition (ACE)
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for the great article, very helpful!

I have followed all the steps but when I set the debug configuration and press 'Debug', I get the following error:

Server returned 401 (Unauthorized) for URL: https://debugging.hana.ondemand.com/start

On the BTP I have a admin and developer role (which has debug rights). Are there any other authorizations I need to enable to get this working?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order...
entry.content: Hello Edrilan Berisha,

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order...
entry.content: Hello Edrilan Berisha, Thanks for the response. I have passed both header and item as part of payload and the API has created both header and item sucessfully. I have verified the same in database tables, VBAK, VBAP. The problem that we are seeing is in the response Payload the items is blank. Our sender system is expecting the item data as well in the response payload. Please let me know if it is possible the get the same in the response payload. I have also reported this issue to SAP. Any insight would be very much help for us. We do not want to go in the direction of custom API for this requirement. Regards, Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order...
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for the response. Our sender system is expecting the item data as well as part of the response payload after successful POST operation and they do not want to perform another GET call. Please let me know if this is possible in this particular API.

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Re: Show Specific Groups Based on Record Criteria
entry.content: Yes please https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/filter-on-multiple-criteria/qaq-p/13662938

entry.title: Re: How to check runtime CR 13 with SP 25 installed from...
entry.content:
Hello,

First thing to note is SP 25 is very old, it's up to SP 35 now.

To take advantage of the current security updates and Clients etc. you should stay up dated, SP 25 will have a lot of security issues due to the age of it.

Also note the Platform info CR for VS no longer supports 2.0 framework and nor does Microsoft. SAP follows Microsoft End of Life for it's products due to CR is Windows Based. CR for VS currently only supports 4.7 and 4.8 framework, see this platform info for more info:

Supported Platforms

Also be aware Product teams are going to stop supporting 32 bit Operating OS's, there is no need to support them any more since all mother boards support 64 bit platform and there is no reason to run applications in 32 bit mode any more. Like in the late 1990's 16 bit OS's were on their way out, same is true for 32 bit software.

See this page for more info and latest download:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Also, for more CR for VS questions post here:

https://support.sap.com/en/product/support-by-product/01200615320800001270.html

entry.title: Re: Planning Professional vs Planning standard Capabilities
entry.content: @verdiam please stop tagging people directly on your questions. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within...
entry.content:
I'll get R&D to look into this but be aware SAP has it's own version of Java, not the one belonging to Oracle.

A quick search finds no KBA's on that CVE.

Crystal Reports itself uses Java Scripts and doesn't use the Java engine itself.

In CR Designer click on Help... About and the more info button. You will see if only uses 2 Java processes and not java.exe.

All I can suggest is to ignore that catch.

entry.title: Automatic assignment of serial number in outbound deliveries
entry.content:
In our logistics process we make purchases with items that handle series.

These products are sold and it is required that when executing the outbound delivery job the system generates the document with the series already entered from purchases

Any idea how to do this?

We have tried to put in the series profile that it is mandatory to mark it in the sales order, but the existing series in the system do not appear in the sales order, generating news that it does not exist, do you perhaps know why this happens?

entry.title: Can RSWUWFML2 Send an e-Mail Notification with the Link to the Work Item in My Fiori Inbox?
entry.content:
In ECC, we'd run RSWUWFML2 to send e-mail notifications for workflow tasks with an attachment that would take to the work item.

With S/4, we are pushing Fiori and would like to have something similar to that: a link that would lead to the work item in Fiori instead. Is that possible?

Example in ECC:

entry.title: Re: FF67 Manual reconciliation
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you can use the SM37 transaction to check the jobs which have been finished. There you can filter for those jobs which are relevant for you.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: ODBC 18 Driver - Invalid Argument for Database
entry.content:
Got them, I sent the file to R&D last week, sorry I forgot to update you.

There was one fix they did and not ported into CR for VS.

He says it will be in SP 36, not sure when it'll be released, likely in June but may be sooner....

entry.title: Re: SAP CRYSTAL REPORT 2020 support ODBC DRIVER 18 FOR SQ...
entry.content:
Currently MS SQL Server 2022 is not supported:

Supported Platforms

entry.title: Re: API_SALES_ORDER retuning empty values for sales order items during POST operation
entry.content: $batch can be used to initiate a GET request after the POST.

entry.title: build a link in C4C
entry.content:
I'm using this structure to build links and send it in mail for BYD system and it works

https://my******.sapbydesign.com/sap/public/ap/ui/runtime?bo_ns=http://sap.com/xi/AP/RFQProcessing/Global&bo=RequestForQuote&
node=Root&operation=SupplierQuoteComparison&object_key=57F9B95C97991EDEB9BF68B8A1C8E47C&key_type=APC_V_UUID

 

I'm trying to do the same in C4C system, it opens the required screen but empty with no data .. any help ?

entry.title: Allocation Using Advanced Formula with Parent Nodes as Driver
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We would like to create this outcome where driver and source value has different granularities and uses parent nodes as driver/source. Please refer to below figure. 

So far, we have been trying this code and it doesn't seem to work. Please advise for how we should debug this script further.

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "ZAMOUNT"
MEMBERSET [d/ZALLO_CYCLE] = "Cycle 3"
MEMBERSET [d/ZACTY_TYPE] = BASEMEMBER([d/ZACTY_TYPE], "MACH")
MEMBERSET [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = BASEMEMBER([d/ZGL_ACCOUNT].[h/POH_Allocation], "ZAS-C2-005", "ZAS-C2-006", "ZAS-C2-007", "ZAS-C2-008", "ZAS-C2-009", "ZAS-C2-010", "ZAS-C2-011")

VARIABLEMEMBER #ACTY OF [d/ZACTY_TYPE]
VARIABLEMEMBER #CCTR OF [d/ZCCTR]

IF [d/ZCCTR] = %Driver% THEN
	DATA([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY", [d/ZALLO_CYCLE] = "Source", [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#")
	DATA([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/ZCCTR] = #CCTR, [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY")
	DATA.APPEND([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZAMOUNT") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZCCTR] = "131210", [d/ZACTY_TYPE] = "#") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY") / RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/ZCCTR] = #CCTR, [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY")
ENDIF

Thank you.

Bhumirapee A.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content: Hi Suzanne, thanks for sharing the change of certification. May I ask what would happen if failing to pass the stay certification assessment at first time. Will my certification be directly invalidated, or can I still keep taking the assessment until passing it, if so, is there a limit on number of attempts?

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas Scripting: Access CDS View on Pub...
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

Since unfortunately, RFC is not available for Personas in a public cloud system, the only way to get other data that is not on the current screen is if you would navigate to some other screen where the information you are looking for is present, store those value(s) in variable(s), then return to the screen you are customizing, where you can use or display them. You can do this via scripting, but it is certainly slower and more complicated than performing an RFC.

entry.title: What happened to Currency property for Generic dimension, why did it disappear?
entry.content:
Last year, SAP offered an Open Course Planning with SAP Analytics Cloud.  I am trying to perform the guided exercise of Week 1.

Page 14 of these exercises instructs as follows: 
Create dimension SAP_CEP_SALESORG as a GENERIC dimension.  
Then click on properties for this dimension.
Under system properties, move the slider to the right to Enable currency.

When I create this dimension, there is no system property to set Enable currency.

On page 16, the exercise instructs to create another dimension SAP_CEP_ENTITY as a generic dimension.

When I click on its properties, you guessed it, there is no system property to enable currencies.

I realize that I could have created either one of these dimensions as type Organization, but only one dimension Organization is permitted.

So my question if how to define a currency property for both SAP_CEP_SALESORG and SAP_CEP_ENTITY because the data files that SAP provided include a column for currency in both of the Excel spreadsheets.

Bob

PS: I have previously activated the Currency conversion slider on Model preferences

entry.title: Re: Duplicidad en número de empleado
entry.content: Translated for anyone who will benefit... "Hello, if I have a collaborator in different company codes it is necessary that when returning to his or her source company code a new personnel number is assigned to him? If you have assigned a new personnel number, which would affect SAP ECP? Greetings from Mexico."

entry.title: Re: Manage Equipment connectivity
entry.content:
Hi Sayuj , 

Concept wise Equipment and Asset is Same or say Asset can represent machine, equipment or any shop floor smart devices.

Equipment connectivity is part of Asset Central and Usage of Asset Central framework in SAP Digital Manufacturing has been deprecated.

With 2311 release, customers can request to move SAP Digital Manufacturing tenant from Asset Central Model to Digital Manufacturing Asset Model (DMAM). 

SAP Note : https://me.sap.com/notes/3378368/E

Hope this helps.

Thanks

Rahul

entry.title: Re: Send Keys on Windows / SAP / saving pdf file
entry.content:
Hello @aleksandra-0601,

sorry, my fault, the keys must be quoted.

SendKeys "%(b)"

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: The CPI URL is not showing any data
entry.content: Did you try to use $top and $skip for paging? $count=true for checking how many records are you trying to download?

entry.title: Re: Send Keys on Windows / SAP / saving pdf file
entry.content:
Hello @thomas_mller13,

as far as I understand it correctly, the requirement here is to automate SAP GUI for Windows via SAP GUI Scripting with VBA.

The calling convention you mention I know only from ABAP. Or is there another way? Let us know.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: View V_GLPOS_N_GL_CT Not Active in DDIC Error in Tran...
entry.content:
applied note 

3347817 - FI Line Item Browser: Incorrect references generated for views V_GLPOS_N_CT and V_GLPOS_N_GL_CT

https://me.sap.com/notes/3347817/E

entry.title: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content:
Hello.

After I execute Local Client Copy with SCCLN by Profile SAP_UCSV, can I delete the Source Client with SCC5N?

The Source Client is 100 and the Target Client is 200.

Because I only need 200 Client. (do not need the application data in 100)

Or is it better to simply lock 100 client (just in case)?

Thank you for all.

entry.title: Re: Common Errors in the Reports
entry.content: Great and clear.

entry.title: How can we export all entityTypes along with properties/ABAP Filed name
entry.content:
Hi Team

How can we export all entityTypes along with properties/ABAP Filed name related to corresponding standard ODATA Services which we activated under our landscape as per the business requirement

 

Best Regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How can we export all entityTypes along with properti...
entry.content:
T-code /n/iwfnd/maint_service can see all the online odata v2 service,
t-code  /iwfnd/v4_admin can see all the online odata v4 service.

Then for each odata service $metadata call, will list all the entitytype, entityset, properties, etc.

entry.title: Is there a way to get my PM orders with a basic start & finish dates 1 month apart?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Is there a way to get my scheduled preventive maintenance orders having basic start date at the beginning of the month and the basic finish at the end of the month? I plan to have this automated for all work orders.

entry.title: Localization (i18n) on Rap application not working
entry.content: I am trying to localize the application in VS code but it not affect on the ui text .

entry.title: Re: Archive Project definition and WBS Element deletion
entry.content:
Firstable, update the file size. In run again the programm.

If error continues, check that the variants exist, clicking on the match code. If variants doesn´t exist create them, save the changes and run again the programm.

entry.title: Re: Introducing: SAP Web Components
entry.content:
Hi Oliver,

We are SAP partner and we want to test UI5 Web Components. As its github (ui5-webcomponents) is updated monthly, it's unstable for us to test. Is there any way to get the the designed version ? or Is there any way to switch to other versions ? For example, the current UI5 Web Component version is 1.24, how can I change it to version 1.22 ?

Many thanks.

 

BRs,

Lisa Shang

entry.title: Re: External view V_GLPOS_N_GL_CT active fail
entry.content: Please try to refresh first and regenerate. Hope it work.

entry.title: Mexico DRC - Invoice rejected - schema xml issue
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When we submit an invoice to be approve via EDICOM we're facing an error related a xml schema and versions.

In S4 side we have a valid xml to be submited to EDICOM but in CPI side (standard iflow) we get the error bellow:

 

org.apache.cxf.binding.soap.SoapFault: com.edicom.ediwinws.service.cfdi.CFDiException: cvc-complex-type.3.1: Value '2.0' of attribute 'Version' of element 'cce11:ComercioExterior' is not valid with respect to the corresponding attribute use. Attribute 'Version' has a fixed value of '1.1'.cvc-complex-type.4: Attribute 'TipoOperacion' must appear on element 'cce11:ComercioExterior'.cvc-pattern-valid: Value '0.0000' is not facet-valid with respect to pattern '[0-9]{1,16}(.([0-9]{1,2}))?'
 
Anyone have faced this issue?
 
thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Instance Refresh Pending transport
entry.content: If I remember correctly, every time that our BASIS team did a copy of the Production environment (PRD) into the Development (DEV) or Quality and Testing (QAT) environments, the transports that had not yet been applied to PRD had to be reapplied to the copied environment (DEV or QAT).

entry.title: SAP Build Code - Speed up your development with Generative AI Assistant - Joule
entry.content:
Introduction

The newly released SAP Build Code has Joule AI integrated to speed up the development. The AI assistant can be used to generate application logic, data models, fiori apps, test scripts, sample data, service definitions and so on. The assistant can even put the code for intelligent checks automatically in cases where it is not called out implicitly in the requirements. For example, in the tutorial - SAP BUILD Code Test Drive - Joule automatically puts a check to see if customer has enough points to redeem. This ensures the comprehensive validation is in place for the application logic and is extremely helpful. However, it is always recommended to review the generated code to make sure it intends to do exactly as told. 

SAP BUILD Code - Joule capabilities

Joule AI saves a lot of time by understanding the context and generating the code on the fly. It reduces the common errors like misspelling, missing symbols etc. that can take time to fix. 

Within the Business application studio - click on the diamond button on BAS toolbar to launch Joule. The next screen will be listing various contexts with which Joule can be used - keep in mind it is generating a CAP application behind the scenes hence the artifact categories:

  1. Data Model and Service Creation - This will help to create the entire data model by narrating the overall business scenario to Joule. The data model includes service creation as well as in oData v2/v4 services.
  2. Sample data - This generates sample data using Joule. This utility is extremely helpful when we do not have connectivity to destination system or just getting started with a prototype. After generating the test data, it can even be edited and appended further if needed.
  3. Application Logic - This category generates codes for business logic as in validations, special rules, error handling, Please note that it may create additional checks on the basis of it's understanding on business logic, hence it is important to review the generated code.
  4. Unit Test - This category generates the unit test cases for the applications. This is very useful to test the apps quickly after making enhancements later on. Joule automatically creates the test cases based on scenario narrations.
  5. SAP Fiori UI - This category generates the Fiori app. For example, I used the below prompt to create a full fledged drill down app for navigating across entire schema:

After running the prompt, Joule displays the sample code or the project files in a window called Joule Staging Area. Drag it upwards in case it is hidden. 

 

Quirks

What is graphical modeler doesn't open or shows a blank window? Try clearing browser cache or opening BAS  in incognito window.

What else can I do with Joule within SAP BUILD Code?

Joule can be launched with a specific CAP aspect as scope - so that it intends to do exactly as in the scope. For example, if the chosen scope is data model it can only create data models and not Fiori apps. However to create entire application at one go, it can be launched as Fiori Tools by typing below in command bar: 

Fiori tools AI: Show Fiori tools Joule.

OR

Start Guide Center tool from command as below:

This brings up Guides on left hand toolbar as below:

Click on "Generative AI-Powered Development" Guide to show all the scopes. Under SAP Fiori UI -> Create an SAP Fiori Application Directly from Your Business Requirements -> Click button Open Joule.

This opens Joule under Fiori tools context where it can generate the entire application - please note that it will replace the entire workspace or any existing CAP applications. This context of Joule tool intends to translate business requirements directly to the code under specific prompt conditions:

  • Request should contain a single app only
  • Query should be only for generating SAP Fiori elements app
  • No second app can be added to existing project
  • Joule can generate automatically below items 
    • Entities and entity labels
    • Entity properties and property labels
    • Entity associations (1:1 and 1:n)
    • Entities with code lists based on the explicit values in the user input
    • Value help based on 1:1 associations and code lists
    • Criticality highlighting for eligible properties in code lists
    • A single list report/object page application with one or two object pages
  • List Report Features
    • Filter fields
    • Table
    • Multiple views for a table
    • Initial data load
  • Object Page Features
    • Section tabs
    • Form sections and fields
    • Table sections
    • Navigation from table section to second object page

Any other deviation from above UI structure is not supported by Joule and this seems obvious with other floorplans since they can be implemented in a number of ways. This might seem a rigid output however below are few examples that are worked are are time savers for simple apps:

  • Start simple - "Create a simple fiori application to show numbers from 1 to 10"

  • Try Northwind - "Create a fiori application displays the list of all products from   https://services.odata.org/V3/OData/OData.svc/Products"

In this case, it did not make the external connection to Northwind and also did not create any service but it did create the data model and the UI:

  • Try a complex app - "Create an app showing the list of incidents. Each incident has a title, description, processor and status, such as “new”, “open”, “resolved”, “canceled”." This creates a drilldown app with List Report navigating to a simple object page.

Even it generated a create screen:

Loved the fact that these apps ran out of the box without any errors and is much more than the boilerplate code!

How can I make Joule work on UI other than List Report and Object floorplans?

To create a free style app or modify the existing app, activate the Joule and open a SAPUI5 view or a controller file. 

Enhancing or editing existing app

Navigate to the Explorer and locate the SAPUI5 project under app/assets/<projectname>. Now click on Joule to launch it in SAPUI5 context. it will look like below:

Below prompts will do exactly as intended:

 

PromptOutput
Perform syntax check on the entire project The syntax of your project files seems to be correct. Both the JavaScript and JSON files are well-structured and don't contain any syntax errors.
Add a new fragment to show current time in the header of objectpageIt gave the detailed explanation of files and places where code needs to be changed. After accepting the code for each file the fragment needs to be manually added to header section via page map to display the current time on object page. 
What does this project do?It gives the detailed explanation of the code - great for reverse engineering the business requirements from existing code!
What are the various enhancements that can be done in this project?It suggested enhancements like error handling, Improving the custom fragment, enhancing user interaction, more features like filter or sort, performance improvements, unit tests, improving accessibility, documentation etc.

 

Creating a full stack Fiori App

Finally, let's try to create a full stack application with a prompt that will create the data models, services, sample data and a fiori application. Type Cmd/Win + Shift + P and launch New Project from Template:

 Choose Full Stack Project and provide the project name and click on Finish button. Wait for the project to load in the workspace completely and then click on Joule button. 

Click on Open Guide button and expand the context - Create an SAP Fiori Application Directly from Your Business requirements. Click on Open Joule button to launch the assistant. 

Enter the below prompt to create a personal finance management app:

I want to create an SAP Fiori application that satisfies the requirements from the following user story:

Description
As an individual seeking financial organization and control, I aim to develop a personal budget management application. This application will empower users to efficiently monitor and manage their finances by tracking and categorizing income and expenses

Transaction:
Below are the attributes of a transaction:

1. Date: The date of the income receipt or expense payment.
2. Description: A brief description of the income source or expense category.
3. Source/Payee: Name of the entity providing income or receiving payment for expenses.
4. Category: This can be income, groceries, utilities, housing, transportation, healthcare, dining out, entertainment, shopping, travel, savings, insurance, education, gift, donation and miscellaneous
5. Amount: The monetary value associated with the income or expense transaction.

Acceptance Criteria:
Scenario 1: View Budget Overview Given I am logged into the personal budget management system, when I launch the application, then I should be able to view a report with below fields:

  • Date
  • Description
  • Category
  • Amount

Now Joule will start creating the entire full stack application using LLMs. This will take a few minutes. Once it is ready - examine Joule staging area to check the contents of the project. Click on Accept files to proceed with creation. This will take a few minutes to complete the operation. 

We can check the explorer view once below message is shown:

 

Expand the project folder -> app -> db -> data and click on [ProjectName]-Transactions.csv file to launch in the editor. Observe how Joule has created realistic data for income and expenses categories. Turn on Mock Data if it is off and add a few more rows under income, utilities and other categories of expenses. 

Click on Run Configurations icon and arrow to launch the application. 

The project preview now opens in a new tab:

Click on the tile to launch the app:

Click on gear icon to launch settings dialog and Group by Name - save this as default variant:

Now the personal finance app is ready to report by categories:

Hence we can see that Joule AI can speed up the full stack application development and can save a lot of developer's time by not just providing the actual code but additional checks and logic.

entry.title: Re: Localization (i18n) on Rap application not working
entry.content: why not do it at backend?

entry.title: Re: EWM PPF Action - Where can I execute custom ABAP code to trigger EWM PPF after a WO is confirmed
entry.content: Why can't you use PPF for warehouse order? I cannot understand the problem.

entry.title: Deployment of Fiori application to CF: Issue with metadata/Odata calls
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have deployed a fiori application built using SAP BAS, where the datamodel was consumed from an onpremise S4HANA system.

 

Cloud connector and Destinations are configured. PFB Destination config

 

The app works fine in preview mode in BAS. Data from onpremise system is viewed properly. However, after deployment of app to cloud foundry, the metadata calls fail with status code 500 : error: 500 Internal Server Error.

Please let me know if there's anything else to be done. 

@gregorw , @Edrilan_Berisha , @N1kh1l 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: Multiple freight orders to a single transportation unit
entry.content: HI Maxime,

entry.title: Re: Multiple freight orders to a single transportation unit
entry.content: HI Maxime, How did you finally manage to achieve this. Kindly through some light on the final solution.

entry.title: NEW SAP GRC certification?
entry.content:
Hi,

does anyone know when the new SAP GRC Certification will released?

entry.title: Shift to Remote, Continuous, and Risk-Adjusted Management with SAP Three Lines of Defense Package
entry.content:
With 90% of compliance leaders expecting evolving business, regulatory, and customer demands to significantly increase compliance-related operating costs, it is no surprise that half of them are already aiming to automate controls monitoring and management capabilities.

The Three Lines of Defense add-on package is designed to help RISE with SAP customers shift to remote, continuous, and risk-adjusted management that drives down risk and compliance costs and builds trust.

By embedding integrated solutions for internal control and compliance, enterprise risk management and internal audit into the very foundation of their SAP software landscape, organizations can automate tasks and decision-making, gain real-time visibility on their compliance status, and equip people to anticipate and respond to the risks standing in the way of achieving business objectives.

Managing risks, controls, and regulatory requirements directly in business operations and monitoring compliance status in real-time is key to supporting risk-based decision-making.

As part of the Three Lines of Defense add-on package, SAP Process Control and SAP Risk Management natively integrate with SAP S/4HANA, SAP Signavio, etc. and work together to automate continuous control and risk monitoring. Effortlessly supporting continuous, automated risk and compliance monitoring across systems and processes. With embedded rules, configurations, and intelligent monitoring capabilities these solutions assist in doing the hard work of detecting, predicting, and mitigating threats in real time and invoking exception processes, when needed.

Furthermore, real-time reporting allows organizations to demonstrate compliance status to stakeholders on demand, reducing the overall assurance effort.

By leveraging this single source of truth, SAP Audit Management further enables organizations to increase assurance and improve audit efficiency - and enables the audit teams shift their focus from providing basic assurance to delivering trusted insight and advice to the business.

With integrated solutions from the Three Lines of Defense add-on package, companies can increase transparency and standardization of their multiple compliance initiatives and focus on the processes and activities that are most important. By aligning value drivers, objectives, and high-impact risks, they can seize opportunities and mitigate risks promptly for increased profitability using instant access to crucial risk indicators.

If you are a RISE with SAP customer, you can benefit from this cost attractive package to optimize collaboration across all three lines, and ensure the reliability, coherence, and transparency of the information required for decision-making.

If you’d like to read more about this package and its components, then have a look at the following links:  

  • Solution brief: Strengthening the Three Lines for Governance, Risk, and Compliance 
  • Overview video: Integrated Risk and Controls Management for SAP S/4HANA 
  • Individual product pages: SAP Process Control, SAP Risk Management and SAP Audit Management

entry.title: Re: What happened to Currency property for Generic dimens...
entry.content:
Hi @robertmcgaffic,

  With latest update of modeler UI, adding currency property workflow is streamlined with adding other properties for a dimension. You can select properties type 'Currency' from there.  So the 'Enable Currency' setting is removed. For organization type dimension, currency is a default property. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Combine Multiple Freight orders, which belong to one Carrier, into one Transportation unit in SAP EW
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am looking for a solution where  I can combine multiple freight orders, which belong to one carrier,  into one Transportation unit in EWM.

Kindly note that this is kind of a parcel scenario and due to multiple constraints, it is not possible to create one Freight order for one carrier.

Please suggest possible solution options.

Thanks in Advance!

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: SAC: hide stories shared by other users
entry.content: Not sure if using the 'Owned by Me' option from view would be good enough for your case.

entry.title: Re: What happened to Currency property for Generic dimens...
entry.content: Hi Bob, as of release 2023.14, and to offer a consistent user experience, the option Enable Currency has been removed from the properties section in the modeler's side panel. Instead, users can create a property of type Currency in the Create Property dialog.

entry.title: Re: Export long table storie in SAC to PDF
entry.content: Just a bit curious, if you directly use the story export menu instead of script to export, do you still observe missing rows?

entry.title: Transfer of Concurrent users to named users
entry.content:
Currently we have a lot of users using Concurrent license and that will changing to named user licesnses.

So how we can do this activity on a mass bunch of users(2000+ users)? Kindly provides a detailed plan.

entry.title: How enter the MSME CERTIFICATE NUMBER on vendor master?
entry.content: Please suggest. How to enter the MSME CERTIFICATE number in vendor master.

entry.title: general ledger
entry.content:
When is it possible to set the open item management indicator in a general ledger account.

When the account is set up as a balance sheet
When the account is set up reconciliation account
When an account is set up as a secondary cost element

When an account has a zero balance

what should be the correct answer can anyone help me out with this.

entry.title: Re: RAP - action parameter Multi-Input Field
entry.content: Any news?

Good day, SAP Experts. 

I have an issue post-implementation of SAP GRC SAC, Risk Colour Combination Not Reflecting On on SAC SAP.

Kindly assist in fixing this issue. 

Thank you in advance.

Kind Regards

Lebo

entry.title: Re: Secure Login Client - Login with user of another domain
entry.content: Hi Experts, Is there a solution for this scenario. If yes, can you please provide the steps.

entry.title: Re: Automatic login not working with Windows AD setup in...
entry.content: Hi, I think the solution in https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3183026 will probably make it work. Can you have a try?

entry.title: Re: I am not able to connect to Enable Now Manager from S...
entry.content: Please find the parameters I have added in the configuration, Please help me if I can modify something.

entry.title: Re: The Future of SAP HCM On-Premise
entry.content:
I'm an old school SAP HR (functional) consultant.  I can understand how there would be several SAP HR customers, who may like the on premise capability; but they still may need to be able to use the cloud also, provided there's enough security.

I've enjoyed working with SAP HR, using it as much as possible in the given standard configuration. To satisfy my customers' needs, I have designed & added my own custom-made functions & operations and ABAP enhancements.  I love the way that the Time management & Payroll programs work through schemas.

entry.title: Re: hey team, can i know how to see the security events l...
entry.content:
Hii team, my query is why the log pattern differs from the blog post... Is there any changes regarding this 

 

FieldSub-fieldLengthDescription

SLGTYPE  SysLog: LIKE structure RSLGETYP
 SLGFTYP1Entry type: "q" = version 1 without field SLGLTRM2, "2" = version 2 including field SLGLTRM2
 AREA2Message area
 SUBID1Message name
SLGDATTIM  Time stamp (CHAR 16)
 DATE8Date in format YYYYMMDD
 TIME6Time in format hhmmss
 DUMMY2not used
SLGPROC  SysLog: LIKE RSLGPID structure
 UNIXPID5Process ID
 TASKTNO5Task
 SLGTTYP2Process type (short form)
SLGLTRM 8Terminal name (truncated)
SLGUSER 12User name
SLGTC 20Transaction
SLGREPNA 40Program
SLGMAND 3Client
SLGMODE 1External mode of an SAP dialog
SLGDATA 64Variable message data
SLGLTRM2 20Terminal name (continued), only available if SLGFTYP=2

entry.title: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store
entry.content: After upgrade of BO from 4.3 sp2 to 4.3 sp4, I got error "Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store" when I try to create new user or when I try to update current one. Would you please give me any tips to to solve the problem.

entry.title: Re: SETUP SECURE LOGIN CLIENT AND LOGIN USING KERBEROS TOKEN [LINKED] #ATR
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm inquiring whether it's feasible to incorporate a new Active Directory (AD) domain, distinct from the one I'm currently logged into, within the SAP Secure Login Client.

As consultants, we operate within our company's domain. However, since we're providing support to our client, who operates within a separate domain, we need to ensure that we can access their SAP Systems using Single Sign-On (SSO). Unfortunately, this isn't possible due to the disparity between our domain and the client's domain. Therefore, we're exploring the option of integrating the client's domain into our SAP Secure Login Client.

FYI, we use VPN to connect to our client systems.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Result recording is not updating/Overwriting the batc...
entry.content:
Hi Arjuna,

 

Thanks a lot for the help. We identified the issue as per mentioned in the note - 3169241.

" Enhancement QMSP0002 is active in the system.

Inside the enhancement (in function module EXIT_SAPLQMSP_002), parameter I_OVERWRITE is cleared by custom-logic. This prevents the transfer of the results to the batch classification.

Parameter I_OVERWRITE is also cleared in cases, when QMSP0002 is activated but it does not contain any coding. "

 

We deactivated this as it didn't contain any custom code and now it's getting overwritten. Thanks a lot for your guidance.

entry.title: RAP # Create only mode issue # create screen not editable with draft
entry.content:
Dear Team,

RAP create only mode is not working when draft is enabled.

use create;
// use update;
// use delete;

Issue: The create screen becomes read-only when draft is enabled.
It works fine without draft.

I am facing this issue with both ABAP Cloud and S/4 ABAP 2023 on-premise.

Any idea how to fix this issue ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Condition type CDS Views
entry.content:
We are in process of development of Purchase register for India . for this we require condition type data for Invoices posted through "Create Supplier Invoice (MIRO)" app.

We have checked YY1_I_SUPPLIERINVOICEAPI01 CDS view but could not find any relevant information for developing Purchase register for India.

Request you to provide CDS view for the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Condition type CDS Views
entry.content: The condition type data is not included in supplier invoice CDS views. You may consider join CDS view I_SUPLRINVCITEMPURORDREFAPI01 and I_PurOrdItmPricingElementAPI01 using join condition PURCHASEORDER. This should enable you to read condition type from the invoice reference PO.

entry.title: Re: Are there any recommendations / restriction of number...
entry.content: What is meant by "star model(fact+dimension)?

entry.title: Re: Getting started with SAP API Business Hub
entry.content:
Hello

the current UI for api.sap.com is totally different.

where is the function of Classic Design in the new UI.

entry.title: Re: access risk analysis
entry.content:
Dear Quadir,

the question is rather how old is the Basis level. If you have just profiles that would not be an issue by its own, however the plugin component can be implemented on SAP BASIS 7.00 and above, hence if the backend system is older than it need to be upgraded. You can see the compatibility in the attached spreadsheet in Note 1352498, if the current version of the plugin is not listed here, then you will not be able to implement a compatible version of GRCPINW, and you will not be able to use any feature of GRC in that particular plugin.

Best Regards,
Mate

entry.title: Empowering Vendors: The Transformative Impact of SAP Chatbot
entry.content:
In below blog series, It is all about Benefits and usecases of custom Chatbot that I have built.

Blog 1 : Why Chatbots in SAP?
Blog 2 : How Chatbot can help Vendors? ( This Blog ) 
Blog 3 : How Chatbot can help Customers?

Why reserve an expensive workforce for repetitive and non-technical vendor queries? Why not automate using a custom-built chatbot? Vendors often ask the following questions as part of their frequently asked questions.    

  • How do I register as a vendor? 
  • What is all the info required to register as a vendor?   
  • What are the criteria and duration needed to qualify? 
  • Where can I see all the open purchase requisitions/Orders? 
  • Where can I submit the product offer price (product catalogue and offer price)? 
  • How do I submit a quotation? 
  • How do I know vendor shortlisting and its criteria? 
  • What is your notification procedure for releasing the orders, or how do you issue the order? 
  • What is the status of my goods delivered? 
  • What is the quality status of the goods delivered, along with rejection reasons, if any?   
  • What is the invoice status and bank transaction status if paid? 
  • How do I change my account number? 
  • How do I change my PAN number?

Enhancing collaboration, process efficiency and productivity

Introduction 

In today’s fast-paced business environment, seamless collaboration and efficient processes are essential for vendors to thrive. SAP custom Chatbot, an innovative solution powered by Natural Language Processing (NLP), offers a unique opportunity for vendors to enhance their interaction with SAP ERP systems and streamline their operations. This blog will explore real-world scenarios where vendors can benefit from a chatbot, revolutionizing their engagement with SAP and improving their overall experience.  

The main concern of all organizations is security regarding digitalization and modernization. We ensure both authorization and authentication of vendors using OTP verification and SAP Standard Roles to enforce granular control over business-critical data.   

Check out the below scenarios where vendors can be benefitted from a chatbot.   

Scenario 1: Simplified purchase order and purchase requisition-related inquiry 

Vendors often need real-time updates on the status of their purchase orders. With chatbot, vendors can converse with the bot to inquire about the quality of their demands. By providing the necessary information, such as the purchase order number or vendor code, the chatbot retrieves the latest updates from the SAP system and promptly responds with accurate information. This scenario eliminates the need for vendors to navigate complex systems/apps or wait for manual updates, resulting in improved transparency and proactive order management. 

Scenario 2: Efficient invoice submission and tracking 

Submitting and tracking invoices can be a time-consuming process for vendors. Chatbot streamlines this workflow by providing a user-friendly interface for invoice submission. Vendors can interact with the chatbot and upload their invoices, from which the chatbot extracts relevant details such as invoice number, amount, due date and others using IDP/OCR. The chatbot validates the information, performs necessary checks, and seamlessly integrates with the SAP system for invoice processing. Vendors can also inquire about the status of their invoices, enabling real-time tracking and proactive follow-ups.

 

 

Scenario 3: Vendor master data management 

Maintaining accurate and up-to-date vendor master data is crucial for smooth business operations. Fiori-based Chatbot offers vendors a convenient way to manage their master data. Vendors can interact with the chatbot to update their contact information, banking details, or tax identification numbers. The chatbot validates the changes, ensures data integrity, and synchronizes the updated information with the SAP system. This scenario empowers vendors to take control of their master data, reducing administrative efforts and ensuring accurate information in the system. UI Adaptive cards in the chatbot allow vendors to register themselves. 

Scenario 4: Timely payment status and remittance advice 

Cash flow management is vital for vendors, and timely payment information is essential for financial planning. A Chatbot lets vendors inquire about payment statuses and receive remittance advice electronically. Vendors can interact with the chatbot, provide invoice details or payment references, and instantly access information on payment status, payment dates, and remittance details. This real-time visibility enhances financial transparency, enables proactive cash flow management, and improves vendor-customer relationships. 

Conclusion 

SAP Chatbot offers vendors a transformative platform to enhance collaboration, streamline processes, and improve efficiency in their interactions with SAP systems. By leveraging the capabilities of a chatbot, vendors can benefit from simplified purchase order status inquiries, efficient invoice submission and tracking, streamlined vendor master data management, and timely payment status updates. This technology-driven Solution empowers vendors to optimize operations, reduce manual efforts, and strengthen their partnership with SAP. 

We have observed 50% – 70% of employee and vendor satisfaction, and employees are better utilized for strategic and more meaningful initiatives in procurement functions.

entry.title: Re: E:SOCM_ACTION_LOG:132, while trying to craete new CD
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Not able to open solman_setup tcode
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

For a newly installed SAP Solution Manager system, see Checklist for a Newly Installed System​ and KBA 2832543. It's helpful not only for solving problems with opening transaction solman_setup, but also for solving other configuration issues.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: ECP Mash up errors
entry.content: As per screenshot the error is showing inside the mashup. Is it that service specific or it appears on any mashup functionality? you may set up a external breakpoint to the error code and reproduce the issue. Once it stops you may try to find why it shows that error.

entry.title: Is it possible to create a report in SAP SIGNAVIO Explorer that includes the folder structure?
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a report in SAP SIGNAVIO that includes the folder structure?


I have mapped the organisational structure from level 1 to level 4 in folders. I have then stored the associated BPMN and value chains in the level 4 folder structure. Now I want to see this folder structure when I create a report, not only the BPMN and the value chain on level 4. Is there a way to include the type "folder" in my report?

entry.title: Re: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the following SAP Knowledge Base Article:

  • 1537913 - Client Copy: Local, Remote, Export/Import & deletion - - > 3. Delete a Client

Also please check the "See Also" section where other related documents listed.

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: C4C Workflow rules SLA violation
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope that you are doing well.

I configured in C4C a workflow rule which is scheduled to send out notification to the HR+Manager when the Due Date of the ticket is almost completed and the ticket is still in progress/open/pending. The rule: 

Scheduling
4
Hour(s)
Before
Completion Due
Execute this Rule if
Conditions are met
 
 
Country 
Equal to
 IND
 
 
Group 1
 
AND
Priority
Equal to
Normal
 
 
Group 1
 
AND
Send Automated E-Mails
Equal to
Yes
 
 
Group 1
 
AND
Status
Not equal to
Completed

The idea is that these notifications should be sent only if the ticket is not completed or closed. The issue is that the notifications are sent even if the ticket is completed or closed.

Do you have any recommendations on how this?

Thank you,

Eli

entry.title: Re: SM62 Event: CL_BATCH_EVENT does not trigger immediately
entry.content:
Hi @Wilbert_Jeuken,

Really sorry for super late reply, but I did not pursue this further with SAP because our client needed immediate resolution and therefore, I implemented alternative solution (using Background Task in FM and directly submitting the program) instead of originally using background unit FM and raising event in SM62 to run the program.

entry.title: BOM component not showing in PI Sheet but shows on process order
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

The new BOM component is not showing in CO60 (PI Sheet) but shows on process order (COR3). Please help. Existing BOM components appear, but when I try to add a new component to the BOM it doesn't pull through to to the PI sheet.

entry.title: Re: Client Copy by SCCLN - Client Deletion by SCC5N
entry.content: Really clear answer! Thank you.

entry.title: SAP GTS E4H, Manage Blocked Documents concatenation of name and description for specific fields
entry.content:
In Manage Blocked Documents, i see that:

FT Organization column has concatenated in one field  - description of the FTO and in the brackets the name of the FTO 

Ctry/Reg of Dep. column has concatenated in one field - description of the country and in the brackets country code 

Cty/Reg of Destination key column has concatenated in one field - description of the country and in the brackets country code 

Is there any way we can change this, and separate the name and the description in 2 columns?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Application to show Data from ODATA S4 System in tubular format
entry.content:
Great blog, 

Helped me to configure Odata to Build Apps.

I'm facing a problem in changing date format in basic table. How can I do modifications of certain fields of the table?

Thankyou 🙂

entry.title: Re: How do I eliminate a page header from appearing on every page?
entry.content: Please add a tag about the product you are talking about...

entry.title: Re: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA 2002...
entry.content: Thank you. I managed to get it working now.

entry.title: Re: Weekday Funktion in SIGNAL?
entry.content:
Hello Niels,
see DATE_ADD | SAP Help Portal. Otherwise - can you not amend the data before the load, so add the grace date before?

entry.title: Elevating Customer Engagement: Harnessing the Power of SAP Chatbots for a Personalized Experience
entry.content:
In below blog series, It is all about Benefits and usecases of custom Chatbot that I have built.

Blog 1 : Why Chatbots in SAP ?
Blog 2 : How Chatbot can help Vendors? 
Blog 3 : How Chatbot can help Customers? ( This Blog )

Introduction

In our previous entries, we laid the groundwork by discussing the transformative role of chatbots in standardizing operations and empowering vendors within the SAP ecosystem. This time, we shift our focus towards the end-users who are the heart of any business—the customers. Chatbots are not just operational tools; they are vital in forging stronger relationships with customers by providing personalized, responsive, and engaging experiences. In our third blog, we delve into how SAP chatbots are redefining customer engagement and driving satisfaction to new heights.

Personalization at Scale

Customers today expect more than generic responses; they seek personalized interactions that make them feel valued. SAP chatbots, powered by advanced analytics and machine learning, can deliver individualized experiences at scale. By analyzing customer data, chatbots can provide tailored recommendations, remember past interactions, and even anticipate needs before the customer articulates them. This level of personalization fosters a sense of loyalty and trust—a critical component in the customer journey.

Real-time Support and Convenience

The immediacy of chatbot communication means customers can get the support they need exactly when they need it. Be it tracking an order, resolving a service issue, or seeking product information, SAP chatbots offer a convenient access point for swift resolutions. This 24/7 availability not only enhances customer satisfaction but also streamlines the support process, making it more efficient for both the customer and the business.

Enhancing the Omnichannel Experience

In an age where customers interact with brands across multiple channels, SAP chatbots ensure a consistent and seamless experience. Whether it's on a website, mobile app, or social media platform, chatbots can integrate across these touchpoints to maintain continuity in customer interactions. This omnipresence is crucial in an omnichannel strategy, ensuring customers receive the same quality of service, regardless of the platform.

Feedback and Continuous Improvement

SAP chatbots are invaluable for gathering customer feedback in real-time. This instantaneous input allows businesses to quickly adapt and refine their offerings. Chatbots can prompt customers for feedback post-interaction, ensuring that the business stays attuned to customer sentiment and expectations, and uses this data to drive continuous improvement in products and services.

Overcoming Barriers with Advanced Capabilities

Our custom SAP chatbot solution is designed to overcome common barriers in customer communication. By employing sophisticated language processing and AI-driven understanding, the chatbots can handle complex queries with ease. They are also equipped to escalate issues to human representatives when necessary, ensuring that customers are not left without a solution.

Conclusion

As we continue to explore the potential of chatbots in the SAP landscape, it's clear that their benefits extend well beyond operational efficiencies. For customers, SAP chatbots represent a new era of engagement, marked by personalization, convenience, and seamless service. By embracing these intelligent conversational agents, businesses can create a customer experience that not only meets but exceeds expectations, fostering lasting relationships and driving brand loyalty.

Stay tuned for our next entry, where we'll explore the technical intricacies of SAP chatbot integration and the future of AI in customer service.

To learn more about how SAP solutions can enhance your customer engagement, connect with our team of experts at Cygnet Digital and take the next step in your digital transformation journey.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Execution error for FIORI Scripts
entry.content:
Hello
CBTA client 3.0.10.1 is outdated. I would suggest to download latest version 3.0.21.5 
from SWDC (cbta30SP21_5-20010323.exe)
See note 3378891 - CBTA 3.0 Release Documentation SP21

Also implement latest version of the Note 2029868 - CBTA - Runtime Library - Fixes & Improvements in solman system and check again.

Best Regards
Pedro

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh Service Key Creation failed
entry.content:
Hi @Ilyass01,

you have already linked the answer for your question. 😉

When creating a service-key you only need to provide a name for the service-key but no JSON parameters - this is not required. As a result you will get the service-key containing the unique credentials for your Event Mesh service instance.

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: Re: Application Job parameters do not refresh
entry.content: Hello, thanks for the answer. So, this will be available in the next public cloud release and the next private cloud release? Greetings Felix

entry.title: Hello, can you please help me in getting logged in user Info UI integration cards in sap build
entry.content: Hello, can you please help me in getting logged in user Info in UI integration cards in sap build.

entry.title: Re: Analysis and Recommended Settings of the Security Audit Log (SM19 / RSAU_CONFIG, SM20 / RSAU_REA
entry.content: Hi @Frank_Buchholz, due to the latest SAP Community update, the layout of your blog post looks horrible now (huge blank spaces), if you don't mind could you fix it please?

entry.title: Re: Layered Bars in Bar chart are reset after replacing t...
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

The formatting as layered bars disappears as soon as all measures are removed. But if you let as least one stay there it holds the format. So, in my case, to change all (two) measures I must do the following:

  • Remove old measure #1
  • Add new measure #1
  • Remove old measure #2
  • Add new measure #2

Maybe this helps someone else, too.

Regards
Tim

entry.title: Re: SAC: hide stories shared by other users
entry.content:
Hi William,

Thanks for your reply. No, in our case we just want users to be able to tidy up the top level file structure for themselves. Users won't be owners of most of the folders and objects within that file structure.

Thanks,

Hugh

entry.title: Be an Expert with PLM System Integration Support Content!
entry.content:
Recently, many of you have asked where to find detailed information on the setup of different integration scenarios via PLM system integration. As you know, PLM system integration enables a seamless transfer of product-relevant data between SAP S/4HANA or SAP ERP and an external PLM system, allowing for bi-directional process integration.  

We are happy to inform you that you can now access a comprehensive set of support knowledge directly from the SAP Help Portal.  
 
Start today and explore the PLM system integration expert content here. Enjoy 

  • Best practices regarding configuration per object type 
  • How-to information on the activation of our standard content via BC Sets 
  • A closer look at error messages and what they tell you. 

Also, learn how you can test your integration, even without an external PLM system in place. 

Check out our our overview video to get a first glimpse!

Now, it's your turn to unleash the full potential of PLM system integration!

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
Hi,

We will convert our current goal plan to the new goals in May, as well as launching a new goal plan for next year. We will convert both plans to the new goals as both will need to be editable for an overlap period.

New goals do not support tasks, but users with the current goal plan will already have existing tasks. Tasks would previously have been carried over to the Other Details tab of the end of year performance review.

I have 2 questions:

  1. When the current goal plan is converted will users be able to see their existing tasks?
  2. Will those existing tasks be carried over to the Other Details tab of the performance review for this year?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Edge issue
entry.content: Hi Cherry,
